title: Design doc for Celeris CLI

title: Post-merge follow-ups for celeris CLI launch
description: After PRs merge: (1) extend COOKBOOK_SUBMODULE_TOKEN with Contents: read on ai-celeris/celeris-cli; (2) create ai-celeris/homebrew-tools tap repo and add HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN secret to celeris-cli; (3) tag v0.1.0 to cut the first release; (4) decide LICENSE for celeris-cli (openai-cli uses Apache-2.0); (5) dispatch scheduled_tests.yaml once to verify scheduled-cli-prod passes
